_note: Track E / J7 (2026-07-16): per-species SHAPE PRIORS distilled from the subtyped reference corpus (wiki: reference-shape-guide-2026-07). SOFT priors only - injected as 'typical, not required' guidance into the Pass-B prompt (stage4_moments) and the S4.5 judge's evidence packets (evidence_packets). NEVER used as hard filters or rejection rules. Mechanical approval gate per the owner's dropped-sit-down rule: only species with n>=8 reference samples appear here (performance_rap n=4 and the wholesome hook exception n=5 were auto-skipped). solo_monologue = the promoted species (was irl_other; 12-13/16 justifications described it). Regenerate/extend by editing this file - both consumers read it at runtime, failure-soft.
